hooks.command: jq -c 'if ((.tool_input.command // "") | test("clasp (push|deploy)")) and ((.tool_input.command // "") | test("ops\\.py") | not) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"clasp push/deploy must go through a declared process: python3 ops/ops.py run renderer-release (see project.yaml processes)"}} else empty end'
